title: Visit the Unbelievable Spotted Lake

scenes.text: This lake showcases vibrant spots of color during summer.
This is Spotted Lake, located in British Columbia, Canada.
The minerals evaporate leaving behind vibrant colors in the summer sun.
These mesmerizing spots are a sight to behold.
scenes.label: MESMERIZING SPOTS

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Spotted Lake, British Columbia - Canada. A colorful and unique lake renowned for its vibrant mineral deposits. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
